Fields.Name: [YOU DIED] Fade Out Duration - Host
Fields.Description: How many seconds have passed after YOU DIED is displayed at the time of death of solo play to start fading out?

Fields.Name: [YOU DIED] Fade Out Duration - Phnatom
Fields.Description: How many seconds have passed after YOU DIED is displayed when a white or black ghost dies to start fading out?

Fields.Name: HP Bar - Visual Scale
Fields.Description: It is used to calculate what percentage of the gauge length provided by the resource is used when displaying the HP gauge.

Fields.Name: FP Bar - Visual Scale
Fields.Description: It is used to calculate what percentage of the gauge length provided by the resource is used when displaying the MP gauge.

Fields.Name: Stamina Bar - Visual Scale
Fields.Description: It is used to calculate what percentage of the gauge length provided by the resource is used when displaying the SP gauge.

Fields.Name: Action Panel Change Threshold - Velocity
Fields.Description: Action panel Switchable player speed. Switchable if below this speed

Fields.Name: Action Panel Change Threshold - Pass Time
Fields.Description: Action panel Consideration time to increase the speed of switchable players. Use the average speed of this time (systematically up to 4 seconds)

Fields.Name: Vertical Position of Key Guide Icon
Fields.Description: Vertical position of key guide icon (+ - top,- - bottom)

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor Select Radius
Fields.Description: If the cursor position is within this radius, it means that it is selected.

Fields.Name: Decal Position Offset - X
Fields.Description: Decal display position offset left and right

Fields.Name: Decal Position Offset - Y
Fields.Description: Decal display position offset vertical direction

Fields.Name: FE Search Icon Fade Time
Fields.Description: The number of seconds it takes for the FE Search icon to start fading in and then fading out.

Fields.Name: FE Battle Icon Fade Time
Fields.Description: The number of seconds it takes for the FE Battle icon to start fading in and then fading out.

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor Speed
Fields.Description: Movement speed when moving smoothly [px]

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor First Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to move only once at the first input [px]

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor First Delay
Fields.Description: The time it takes to move only once at the first input [sec]

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor Wait Time
Fields.Description: Waiting time from input to smooth movement [sec]

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor Snap Radius
Fields.Description: Move the cursor closer than this radius to start adsorption (for snap mode) [px]

Fields.Name: World Map - Cursor Snap Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to start and complete adsorption [sec]

Fields.Name: Item Get Log Alive Time
Fields.Description: Time to add one line of log and fade out. There is a timer for each line [sec]

Fields.Name: Player Max Poise Guage Length
Fields.Description: It is used to calculate what percentage of the gauge length provided by the resource is used when displaying the SA gauge.

Fields.Name: World Map - Underground Layer Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Specify the event flag ID that manages whether it is possible to switch to the underground map. When this event flag ID is ON, it is possible to switch to the underground map.

Fields.Name: World Map - Travel Margin
Fields.Description: Distance (m) that extends in four directions around the player. I decided to break through this range

Fields.Name: System Announcement - Scroll Buffer Time
Fields.Description: The number of seconds to wait before and after scrolling through the long text of the operation announcement. For example, if it is 3 seconds, wait for a total of 6 seconds before and after.

Fields.Name: System Announcement - Scroll Speed
Fields.Description: Scrolling speed (pixels / second) when scrolling long sentences in the operation announcement. It does not depend on the screen size. Think of the entire menu as 1920x1080

Fields.Name: System Announcement - No Scroll Wait Time
Fields.Description: The number of seconds to display when it is a short sentence that does not require scrolling of the operation announcement

Fields.Name: System Announcement - Scroll Count
Fields.Description: Number of times to repeat when scrolling long sentences of management announcement

Fields.Name: Compass Memo Display Distance
Fields.Description: Display distance [m] of the memo marker displayed on the compass. Anything closer than this distance will be displayed

Fields.Name: Compass Bonfire Display Distance
Fields.Description: The display distance of the bonfire displayed on the compass [m]. Anything closer than this distance will be displayed

Fields.Name: Destination Marrker Threshold
Fields.Description: Goal judgment distance [m] of the destination marker. The destination marker disappears when you get closer than this distance

Fields.Name: Saturation/Brightness Slider Step
Fields.Description: Amount of movement of the saturation / brightness slider of the color control [% / sec]. Maximum amount to move in 1 second when each value is 0% to 100%. Since it is operated with an analog stick, it becomes a ratio by the input value.

Fields.Name: Pre-opening Movie - Wait Time
Fields.Description: Wait time before playing the OP movie. > SEQ 15261

Fields.Name: Key Guide Icon - Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the key guide icon. 100% is the texture size as it is

Fields.Name: Key Guide Icon for Table - Scale
Fields.Description: Scale value of the key guide icon for the pad operation list. 100% is the texture size as it is

Fields.Name: Key Guide Icon for Table - Vertical Position
Fields.Description: Vertical position of the key guide icon for the pad operation list (+ - top,- - bottom)

Fields.Name: Key Guide Icon for Key Config - Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the key guide icon for the key config. 100% is the texture size as it is

Fields.Name: Key Guide Icon for Key Config - Vertical Position
Fields.Description: Vertical position of key guide icon for key config (+ - top,- - bottom)

Fields.Name: World Map Search Radius
Fields.Description: Range [m] (radius) that makes unsearched masks searched. It is assumed that the circle centered on the player has been searched.

Fields.Name: Tutorial Display Time
Fields.Description: Tutorial (toast notification) display time [sec]. It will be closed automatically after this time has passed

Fields.Name: Compass Friendly Phantom Display Distance
Fields.Description: Display distance [m] of other players (friendly hosts) to be displayed on the compass. If you are more than this distance, it will be displayed on the compass.

Fields.Name: Compass Hostile Phantom Display Distance
Fields.Description: Display distance [m] of other players (enemy hosts) displayed on the compass. If you are more than this distance, it will be displayed on the compass.

Fields.Name: Compass Guest Phantom Display Distance
Fields.Description: Display distance [m] of other players (friendly guests) to be displayed on the compass. If you are more than this distance, it will be displayed on the compass.

Fields.Name: Cutscene Key Guide - Display Time
Fields.Description: The amount of time that the key guide will continue to be displayed after the cutscene skip has been pre-entered. Since skip input is accepted only while the key guide is displayed, it can be said that it is the skip input acceptance time.

Fields.Name: Auto HUD - HP Ratio to display HUD
Fields.Description: [HUD - Auto setting] HP ratio. If the HP ratio is below this value, the HP gauge will always be displayed. Percentage and current value are OR conditions (displayed if either is satisfied)

Fields.Name: Auto HUD - Display HUD when below X HP
Fields.Description: [HUD - Auto setting] HP current value. If the current HP value is less than or equal to this value, the HP gauge will always be displayed. Percentage and current value are OR conditions (displayed if either is satisfied)

Fields.Name: Auto HUD - FP Ratio to display HUD
Fields.Description: [HUD - Auto setting] MP ratio. If the MP ratio is below this value, the MP gauge is always displayed. Percentage and current value are OR conditions (displayed if either is satisfied)

Fields.Name: Auto HUD - Display HUD when below X FP
Fields.Description: [HUD - Auto setting] MP current value. If the current MP value is less than or equal to this value, the MP gauge is always displayed. Percentage and current value are OR conditions (displayed if either is satisfied)

Fields.Name: Auto HUD - Stamina Ratio to display HUD
Fields.Description: [HUD - Auto setting] SP ratio. If the SP ratio is less than or equal to this value, the SP gauge is always displayed. Percentage and current value are OR conditions (displayed if either is satisfied)

Fields.Name: Auto HUD - Display HUD when below X Stamina
Fields.Description: [HUD - Auto setting] SP current value. If the current SP value is less than or equal to this value, the SP gauge is always displayed. Percentage and current value are OR conditions (displayed if either is satisfied)

Fields.Name: World Map Zoom Animation Time
Fields.Description: World map - Time to zoom animation [seconds]

Fields.Name: World Map Icon Minimum Scale
Fields.Description: World map - Display magnification of the map point icon at zoom step 0 (0.0 to 1.0). 1x (1.0) at zoom step 2. From there, the icon magnification is also interpolated according to the enlargement ratio.

Fields.Name: World Map - Travel Margin Point
Fields.Description: World map - Additional ban distance [m] when the ban is lifted in map point units. When the ban on map points such as the distant view stand is lifted, the ban on the traversal range will be lifted. Distance to be additionally extended in 4 directions around the map point

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Guage - Max Left Justification
Fields.Description: How far can the center coordinates of the enemy HP gauge go to the left end? Since it is the center coordinate, the size of the gauge body is included.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Guage - Max Right Justification
Fields.Description: How far can the center coordinates of the enemy HP gauge go to the right end? Since it is the center coordinate, the size of the gauge body is included.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Guage - Max Top Justification
Fields.Description: How far can the center coordinates of the enemy HP gauge go to the upper end? Since it is the center coordinate, the size of the gauge body is included.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Guage - Max Bottom Justification
Fields.Description: How far can the center coordinates of the enemy HP gauge go to the lower end? Since it is the center coordinate, the size of the gauge body is included.

Fields.Name: HP Threshold to display Horse HP
Fields.Description: Threshold for displaying the PC horse HP gauge at the time of recovery. Constant value of Display HP bar when it increases more than a certain value at a time
